# Contributing

This repository is based on a Sven Widowski template.

## Scope
External contributions are not accepted unless explicitly agreed.

## Changes
- Follow the AI instructions referenced in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).
- Do not duplicate global instruction files locally.

## Pull Requests
- Keep changes small and focused.
- Do not mix refactoring and feature changes.
- Documentation belongs under [docs/](../docs/).

## Questions
Contact the project owner before starting larger changes.
